sentence: O cielo no ye claro hue.
ipa: o θjelo no ʝe klaɾo we
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Western High-Aragonese distinción ⟨c⟩ [θ] and Ĕ>ie 'cielo' per kuhn1935; conservative Ansó profile per barcos2007.

sentence: Estos zapatos cuestan cuaranta euros.
ipa: estos θapatos kwestan kwaɾanta ewɾos
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: ⟨z⟩ [θ] distinción and Ŏ>ue 'cuestan' per kuhn1935; ⟨s⟩+voiced onset sandhi per barcos2007.

sentence: Kiero fablar con o mío bezín.
ipa: kjeɾo fabla kon o mio beθin
gloss_en: I want to speak with my neighbour.
notes: Word-final ⟨r⟩ deleted in the infinitive 'fablar' [faˈbla] — the diagnostic Ansó isogloss (final -r lost, contra Fago/Cheso) per barcos2007; F- retained 'fablar' per kuhn1935.

sentence: Mi chirmán ye un buen trobador.
ipa: mi tʃiɾman ʝe un bwen tɾoβaðo
gloss_en: My brother is a good troubadour.
notes: Final ⟨r⟩ deleted 'trobador' [tɾoβaˈðo] per barcos2007; initial ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'chirmán' and Ŏ>ue 'buen' per kuhn1935.

sentence: Ves de frente y tuerce en a primera carrera.
ipa: bes de fɾente ʝ tweɾθe en a pɾimeɾa kareɾa
gloss_en: Go straight ahead and turn at the first street.
notes: F- retained 'frente' and Ŏ>ue with distinción 'tuerce' per kuhn1935; 'carrera' (street) per barcos2007.

sentence: A carne d'aquel puesto yera buena.
ipa: a kaɾne ð akel pwesto ʝeɾa bwena
gloss_en: The meat from that place was good.
notes: Ŏ>ue 'puesto','buena' and imperfect 'yera' per kuhn1935; clitic ⟨d'⟩ elision per barcos2007.

sentence: Án ye a clau?
ipa: an ʝe a klaw
gloss_en: Where is the key?
notes: Interrogative 'án' and 'clau' (key) per kuhn1935; conservative Ansó lexicon per barcos2007.

sentence: Cuántas presonas bienen a cenar?
ipa: kuantas pɾesonas bjenen a θena
gloss_en: How many people are coming to dinner?
notes: Ĕ>ie 'bienen' and distinción ⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'cenar' per kuhn1935; count question per barcos2007.

sentence: Si yo podese, mercarba aquella casa.
ipa: si ʝo poðese meɾkaɾba akeʎa kasa
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that house.
notes: Aragonese conditional -arba 'mercarba' and 'mercar' per kuhn1935; imperfect subjunctive 'podese' per barcos2007.

sentence: Ahiere merqué cinco quilos de cereixas.
ipa: ajeɾe meɾke θinko kilos de θeɾejʃas
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought five kilos of cherries.
notes: Distinción ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'cinco' and ⟨ix⟩ [ʃ] 'cereixas' per kuhn1935; preterite 'merqué' per barcos2007.

sentence: Iré ta Uesca a mercar pan.
ipa: iɾe ta weska a meɾka pan
gloss_en: I will go to Huesca to buy bread.
notes: Final ⟨r⟩ deleted in the infinitive 'mercar' [meɾˈka] per barcos2007; directional 'ta' and F->none 'Uesca' per kuhn1935.

sentence: Truca-me cuando plegues ta casa.
ipa: tɾuka me kwando pleɡes ta kasa
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: 'trucar','plegar' [ˈpleɡes] per kuhn1935; ⟨gu⟩ [ɡ] before front vowel per barcos2007.

sentence: Buenos diyas, cómo te ba?
ipa: bwenos diʝas komo te ba
gloss_en: Good morning, how are you?
notes: Ŏ>ue 'buenos' and 'diya' (day) per kuhn1935; greeting register per barcos2007.

sentence: Más bale paxaro en man que ciento bolando.
ipa: mas bale paʃaɾo en man ke θjento bolando
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'paxaro' and distinción ⟨ci⟩ [θ] Ĕ>ie 'ciento' per kuhn1935; proverb per barcos2007.

sentence: A muller biella pilla l'agulla amariella.
ipa: a muʎe bjeʎa piʎa l aɡʎa amaɾjeʎa
gloss_en: The old woman picks up the yellow needle.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] preserved 'muller','biella','pilla','agulla' and Ĕ>ie 'biella','amariella' per kuhn1935; clitic ⟨l'⟩ per barcos2007.

sentence: O can corre por a ribera.
ipa: o kan kore po a riβeɾa
gloss_en: The dog runs along the riverbank.
notes: Trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'corre' vs tap [ɾ] 'ribera' per kuhn1935; 'can' (dog) per barcos2007.

sentence: Feito y güeit fan una ueitena.
ipa: fejto ʝ ɡweit fan una weitena
gloss_en: Done, and eight make a set of eight.
notes: F- retained 'feito' and -CT- > -it- 'feito','güeit' per kuhn1935; numeral 'güeit' per barcos2007.

sentence: A finestra ye ubierta ta o mon.
ipa: a finestɾa ʝe uβjeɾta ta o mon
gloss_en: The window is open to the mountain.
notes: Ŏ>ie 'ubierta' and 'finestra' (window) per kuhn1935; directional 'ta' per barcos2007.

sentence: Plebe muito sobre os campos berdes.
ipa: pleβe mwito sobɾe os kampos beɾdes
gloss_en: It rains a lot over the green fields.
notes: 'plebe' (rains), 'muito' (< MULTU) per kuhn1935; plural article 'os' per barcos2007.

sentence: No quiero cantar ni chuar hue.
ipa: no kjeɾo kanta ni tʃwa we
gloss_en: I do not want to sing or play today.
notes: Final ⟨r⟩ deleted in both infinitives 'cantar' [kanˈta], 'chuar' [tʃuˈa] — the Ansó isogloss per barcos2007; initial ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'chuar' (to play) per kuhn1935.
